name: Active Cash Card
perks: Unlimited 2% cash rewards on purchases, no categories to track
$200 cash rewards bonus after spending $500 in first 3 months
0% intro APR on purchases and qualifying balance transfers for 12 months
Cell phone protection (up to $600, $25 deductible) when you pay bill with card
drawbacks: 3% balance transfer fee during intro period
No travel perks or airport lounge access
No bonus categories for higher earning
